statement: In every magma, Equation 2106 (`x = ((y * x) * y) * (z * w)`) implies Equation 4532 (`x * (y * z) = (y * z) * y`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0571
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y x) y) (op z w))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x (op y z)) = (op (op y z) y)
